catalog_row.Paper: Inflation in the Great Recession and New Keynesian Models
catalog_row.ModelType: Linearized Smets-Wouters DSGE with drifting inflation target; no active full financial-frictions net-worth block in SWpi implementation
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Smets-Wouters medium-scale NK model; habit formation; investment adjustment costs; variable utilization; Calvo prices and wages; drifting inflation target; flexible-price/wage output gap; inactive spread-shock residue in Rep-MMB cross-check
catalog_row.RawPDF: raw/mmb_papers/Infation in the Great recession and New Keynesian models.pdf

status_row.paper_title: Inflation in the Great Recession and New Keynesian Models
status_row.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/Infation in the Great recession and New Keynesian models.pdf
status_row.notes: First-pass derivation from MinerU Markdown; PDF not opened; no local appendix normalization; SWpi target-process and inactive spread-shock implementation differences need review.

unresolved_issues: No local appendix normalization exists for source-backed steady-state formulas.
Paper-side time-varying inflation target process is commented out in the Rep-MMB SWpi implementation.
Rep-MMB SWpi implementation retains inactive spread-shock equations despite describing the variant as no-financial-frictions.
Primary source title and raw PDF path contain the OCR/file-name typo 'Infation'.
Runtime validation, BK checks, and IRF checks were not performed.
